zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Ragsdale於1575年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 布利其福德時，他的父親William Ragsdale41歲，母親Vanessa Travis30歲。他於1595年11月30日與Ellen Sansame在英國越可爾姆斯頓結婚。他去世於1615年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Ragsdale于1575年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 布利其福德时，他的父亲William Ragsdale41岁，母亲Vanessa Travis30岁。他于1595年11月30日与Ellen Sansame在英国越可爾姆斯頓结婚。他去世于1615年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ragsdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name from Ragdale (Leicestershire). The placename appears to derive from Old English hraca ‘throat, gulley, narrow pass’ (genitive hracan) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’. From the 16th century onward the more common form of the surname is Ragsdale with an intrusive -s-.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Ragsdale was born in 1575, in East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, William Ragsdale, was 41 and his mother, Vanessa Travis, was 30. He married Ellen Sansame on 30 November 1595, in Muston, Yorkshire, England. He died in 1615, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Ragsdale est né en 1575, à East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Ragsdale, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Vanessa Travis, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Sansame le 30 novembre 1595, à Muston, Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1615, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Ragsdale 1575 in East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ragsdale 41 und seine Mutter Vanessa Travis 30. Er hat am 30. November 1595 in Muston, Yorkshire, England Ellen Sansame geheiratet. Er starb 1615 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Ragsdale è nato il nel 1575 nel East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William Ragsdale, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Vanessa Travis, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Sansame il 30 novembre 1595, nel Muston, Yorkshire, England. Morì nel 1615, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Ragsdaleが1575年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト ブリドグフォードで生まれた時，父William Ragsdaleは41歳，母Vanessa Travisは30歳であった。1595年11月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアムストンでEllen Sansameと結婚した。彼は1615年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Ragsdale(이)가 1575년 영국 노틴그함실르 이스트 브리지퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ragsdale(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Vanessa Travis(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1595년 11월 30일 영국 요르크실르 무스턴에서 Ellen Sansame(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1615년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Ragsdale nasceu em 1575, em East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ragsdale, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Vanessa Travis, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Sansame em 30 de novembro de 1595, em Muston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1615, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Ragsdale родился в 1575 г. в местности эаст бриджфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Ragsdale было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Vanessa Travis, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Sansame 30 ноября 1595 г. в местности мустон, еркшир, Англия. Он умер в 1615 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Ragsdale nació en 1575, en East Bridgford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Ragsdale, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Vanessa Travis, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ellen Sansame el 30 de noviembre de 1595, en Muston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1615, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
